title: 20 law grants at P250k, 5 MBA at P500k
primary_topics: FLP's 2025-2026 grants: 20 legal scholarships (P250k each) and 5 MBA fellowships (P500k)
Ayala Corp partnership for dissertation writing contest awards
perpetuating CJ's core philosophy of liberty and prosperity under the rule of law
sub_topics: 20 legal scholarships at P250,000 each (total P5 million), partnered with the Tan Yan Kee Foundation

notable_anecdotes.summary: FLP's 2025-2026 grant tally: P5 million in legal scholarships across 20 students (P250,000 each), plus P2.5 million in MBA-equivalent Esmel fellowships across 5 students (P500,000 each), plus an FLP-Ayala Corp dissertation writing contest with a graduated cash-prize ladder
Two of the 10 FLP scholars who took the 2024 bar exams placed in the top six â€” Kyle Tutor (UP) at 1st place and Love Quebrar (UP) at 6th
Sean James Borja (Ateneo de Manila law valedictorian, 2018) â€” FLP's first bar topper at 1st place â€” invoked as the program's foundational success
The Board of Judges led by SC Justice Jhosep Y. Lopez, with Dean Anna Maria D. Abad, lawyer Franchette M. Acosta, CTA Justice Marian Ivy Reyes Fajardo, and lawyer Joel Emerson Gregorio
Full texts of the five winning dissertations accessible at www.libpros.com
